$comment: Glass House pack — filtered house, 120 BPM, A minor. Four-on-the-floor kick, plucked sub bass, wide pads, soulful vocal stabs. 32 8-bar loops + 16 one-shots. Constraints per docs/audio-kits.md.

items.prompt: Filtered house drum loop, 120 BPM, A minor key context, 8 bars. Punchy four-on-the-floor kick on every beat, crisp clap on beats 2 and 4, closed hi-hat on every off-beat 8th, open hi-hat on the and-of-4 of every bar. Strong, accented kick attack on the downbeat of bar 1 (loudest moment of the loop). All 8 bars play the same locked groove with continuous percussion — no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable. Bright modern house mix. Just drums, no instruments, no bass, no melody, no vocals.

Deep house drum loop, 120 BPM, A minor key context, 8 bars. Soft four-on-the-floor kick on every beat, soft snare on beats 2 and 4, shaker 16ths throughout, ride cymbal on every beat. Strong, accented kick attack on the downbeat of bar 1 (loudest moment of the loop). All 8 bars play the same locked groove with continuous percussion — no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable. Warm late-night deep house mix. Just drums, no instruments, no bass, no melody, no vocals.

Tech-house drum loop, 120 BPM, A minor key context, 8 bars. Tight punchy kick on every beat, snappy clap on beats 2 and 4, percussive shaker pattern on the 16th-note grid, congas weaving through. Strong, accented kick attack on the downbeat of bar 1 (loudest moment of the loop). All 8 bars play the same locked groove with continuous percussion — no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable. Modern tech-house punch. Just drums, no instruments, no bass, no melody, no vocals.

Disco-house drum loop, 120 BPM, A minor key context, 8 bars. Four-on-the-floor kick, tambourine on every off-beat 8th, snare on 2 and 4, hat opens on the and-of-4. Strong, accented kick attack on the downbeat of bar 1 (loudest moment of the loop). All 8 bars play the same locked groove with continuous percussion — no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable. Disco-influenced house with vinyl warmth. Just drums, no instruments, no bass, no melody, no vocals.

Garage-influenced house drum loop, 120 BPM, A minor key context, 8 bars. Two-step kick pattern: kick on beat 1 and beat 3.5, snare on beats 2 and 4, swung shaker 16ths. Strong, accented kick attack on the downbeat of bar 1 (loudest moment of the loop). All 8 bars play the same locked swung groove with continuous percussion — no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable. UK garage flavour. Just drums, no instruments, no bass, no melody, no vocals.

Afro-house drum loop, 120 BPM, A minor key context, 8 bars. Four-on-the-floor kick, congas on every 8th, shaker 16ths, occasional log drum accent. Strong, accented kick attack on the downbeat of bar 1 (loudest moment of the loop). All 8 bars play the same polyrhythmic groove with continuous percussion — no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable. Warm Afro-house texture. Just drums, no instruments, no bass, no melody, no vocals.

Minimal house drum loop, 120 BPM, A minor key context, 8 bars. Sparse kick on beats 1 and 3, hi-hat 16ths only, occasional rim-click on beats 2 and 4. Strong, accented kick attack on the downbeat of bar 1 (loudest moment of the loop). All 8 bars play the same minimal groove with continuous percussion — no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable. Stripped-back minimal house. Just drums, no instruments, no bass, no melody, no vocals.

Big-room house drum loop, 120 BPM, A minor key context, 8 bars. Heavy four-on-the-floor kick, layered clap on 2 and 4, white-noise snare hits on every off-beat. Strong, accented kick attack on the downbeat of bar 1 (loudest moment of the loop). All 8 bars play the same big groove with continuous percussion — no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable. Festival-style big-room house. Just drums, no instruments, no bass, no melody, no vocals.

Plucked sub bass house loop, 120 BPM, in A minor, 8 bars. Strong, accented attack on A1 at the downbeat of bar 1 (loudest moment of the loop). Punchy plucked sub bass plays root A1 on beat 1 and beat 3 of every bar. All 8 bars repeat the same pulse. Continuous bass energy across all 8 bars; no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable. Just bass, no drums, no melody, no vocals.

Filtered house bass loop, 120 BPM, in A minor, 8 bars. Strong, accented attack on A1 at the downbeat of bar 1 (loudest moment of the loop). Warm filtered analog bass plays a syncopated A-rest-A-C-rest-A-E-rest groove that repeats across all 8 bars. Continuous bass energy across all 8 bars; no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable. Just bass, no drums, no melody, no vocals.

Pumping sidechain bass loop, 120 BPM, in A minor, 8 bars. Strong, accented attack on A1 at the downbeat of bar 1 (loudest moment of the loop). Sustained sub bass on A1 with strong four-on-the-floor sidechain pumping (the bass ducks every beat as if a kick is hitting). All 8 bars repeat the same pump. Continuous bass energy across all 8 bars; no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable. Just bass, no drums, no melody, no vocals.

Walking acid bass loop, 120 BPM, in A minor, 8 bars. Strong, accented attack on A1 at the downbeat of bar 1 (loudest moment of the loop). 303-style acid bass walks A → C → E → G across every bar with subtle filter cutoff modulation. All 8 bars repeat the same walk. Continuous bass energy across all 8 bars; no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable. Just bass, no drums, no melody, no vocals.

Detuned dual-saw bass house loop, 120 BPM, in A minor, 8 bars. Strong, accented attack on A1 at the downbeat of bar 1 (loudest moment of the loop). Detuned dual-saw sub bass on A1 sustained for all 8 bars with subtle filter movement. Continuous bass energy across all 8 bars; no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable. Just bass, no drums, no melody, no vocals.

Slap-funk bass house loop, 120 BPM, in A minor, 8 bars. Strong, accented slap-attack on A1 at beat 1 (loudest moment of the loop). Slap-and-pop electric bass with a syncopated 16th-note groove rooted on A. All 8 bars repeat the same groove. Continuous bass energy across all 8 bars; no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable. Just bass, no drums, no melody, no vocals.

Garage-style bass loop, 120 BPM, in A minor, 8 bars. Strong, accented attack on A1 at the downbeat of bar 1 (loudest moment of the loop). Bouncy two-step UK-garage sub bass: A1 on beat 1, A1 on beat 2.5, E2 on beat 3, A1 on beat 4. All 8 bars repeat the same pattern. Continuous bass energy across all 8 bars; no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable. Just bass, no drums, no melody, no vocals.

Rolling bassline house loop, 120 BPM, in A minor, 8 bars. Strong, accented attack on A1 at the downbeat of bar 1 (loudest moment of the loop). Rolling 16th-note bassline on A pentatonic with subtle pitch movement, classic UK bassline-house style. All 8 bars repeat the same roll. Continuous bass energy across all 8 bars; no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable. Just bass, no drums, no melody, no vocals.

Wide pad chord loop, 120 BPM, in A minor, 8 bars. Strong, accented chord stab on the downbeat of bar 1 (loudest moment of the loop). Lush analog pad sustains an A minor chord progression: Am → F → C → G across 2 bars, repeating across all 8 bars. Continuous melodic energy across all 8 bars; no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable. Wide stereo, slightly detuned. Just pads, no drums, no bass, no vocals.

Plucked synth chord stabs house loop, 120 BPM, in A minor, 8 bars. Strong, accented stab on the downbeat of bar 1 (loudest moment of the loop). Bright plucked synth plays Am - F - C - G chord stabs on beats 1 and 3 of each bar. All 8 bars repeat. Continuous melodic energy across all 8 bars; no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable. Filtered, classic house stabs. Just stabs, no drums, no bass, no vocals.

Filtered piano riff house loop, 120 BPM, in A minor, 8 bars. Strong, accented piano hit on the downbeat of bar 1 (loudest moment of the loop). Filtered grand piano plays a four-note motif A-C-E-G across each bar in A minor, classic French house piano. All 8 bars repeat. Continuous melodic energy across all 8 bars; no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable. Just piano, no drums, no bass, no vocals.

Saw-lead house riff loop, 120 BPM, in A minor, 8 bars. Strong, accented saw-lead attack on the downbeat of bar 1 (loudest moment of the loop). Bright saw-wave synth plays a hooky melodic riff in A minor pentatonic across each bar. All 8 bars repeat. Continuous melodic energy across all 8 bars; no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable. Just synth lead, no drums, no bass, no vocals.

Organ chord stabs house loop, 120 BPM, in A minor, 8 bars. Strong, accented organ stab on the downbeat of bar 1 (loudest moment of the loop). Hammond-style organ plays Am - Dm - Em - Am chord stabs on beats 1 and 3 of each bar. All 8 bars repeat. Continuous melodic energy across all 8 bars; no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable. Warm soulful organ. Just organ, no drums, no bass, no vocals.

Plucked guitar house riff loop, 120 BPM, in A minor, 8 bars. Strong, accented guitar pluck on the downbeat of bar 1 (loudest moment of the loop). Single-note plucked clean guitar plays a melodic riff in A minor across each bar, four-on-the-floor friendly. All 8 bars repeat. Continuous melodic energy across all 8 bars; no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable. Just guitar, no drums, no bass, no vocals.

Bell pluck arpeggio house loop, 120 BPM, in A minor, 8 bars. Strong, accented bell hit on the downbeat of bar 1 (loudest moment of the loop). Bright bell synth arpeggiates A minor 7 chord across each bar in 16th notes. All 8 bars repeat. Continuous melodic energy across all 8 bars; no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable. Just bell synth, no drums, no bass, no vocals.

Brass stab house loop, 120 BPM, in A minor, 8 bars. Strong, accented brass stab on the downbeat of bar 1 (loudest moment of the loop). Synth brass section plays A minor stabs on beats 1 and 3, F major stabs on the and-of-2 and and-of-4 of every bar. All 8 bars repeat. Continuous melodic energy across all 8 bars; no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable. Just brass, no drums, no bass, no vocals.

A cappella ISOLATED sung female filtered-house DIVA hook (SOUL HOOK), 120 BPM, A minor, 8 bars. Modern French-house / Ibiza club diva delivery — anthemic, bright, energetic, four-on-the-floor club energy. NOT 70s soul, NOT lounge, NOT dusty — think 2000s filtered-house club anthem vocal samples, peak Saturday-night Ibiza terrace anthem. STRICTLY VOCAL TRACK ONLY — absolutely no kick drum, no snare, no hi-hat, no bass, no sub-bass, no synth, no piano, no pad, no rhythmic backing of any kind. NOTHING below 100 Hz must be present. The female voice sings continuously every single bar — no silent bars, no break longer than 200 ms. Bars 1-2 belt OH I FEEL IT on the root note A with bright forward attack, bars 3-4 climb LET IT GO climbing the A minor scale anthem-style, bars 5-6 belt OH I FEEL IT octave up at peak intensity, bars 7-8 sustained AHHH ad-lib resolving back. Bright, anthemic, modern club-diva delivery — projected like a peak-time anthem, NOT a smoky lounge. Imagine a vocal stem isolated from a 2000s filtered-house anthem — only the voice exists in the file. Loopable.

A cappella sung female chant repeating COME ON, 120 BPM, A minor, 8 bars. The ONLY phrase in the entire 8-bar loop is the words COME ON — never any other lyrics, never sustained ahhh, never la la la, never any other words. PURE VOCAL ONLY — absolutely no instruments, no drums, no bass, no piano, no synth, no melody, no beat, no instrumental backing whatsoever. Pattern: COME ON sung on beats 1 and 3 of every bar, identical pattern repeats across all 8 bars with subtle pitch and energy variation. Hooky house-diva delivery, every COME ON is a short two-syllable percussive stab less than 600 ms long. NOT a sung melody, NOT la-la-la, NOT a hook with other lyrics — only the literal phrase COME ON repeating. Continuous vocal energy across all 8 bars; no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable.

A cappella ISOLATED sung female filtered-house DIVA anthem repeating TAKE ME HIGHER, 120 BPM, A minor, 16 bars. Modern French-house / Ibiza club diva delivery — anthemic, bright, energetic, peak-time terrace vibe. NOT 70s soul, NOT smoky, NOT lounge — think classic 90s/2000s house club anthem. STRICTLY VOCAL TRACK ONLY — absolutely no kick drum, no snare, no hi-hat, no bass, no sub-bass, no synth, no piano, no pad, no rhythmic backing of any kind. NOTHING below 100 Hz must be present. The female voice sings continuously every single bar — no silent bars, no break longer than 200 ms. Bars 1-4 belt TAKE ME HIGHER on the root note A with bright forward attack, bars 5-8 climb OH OH OH ascending the A minor scale, bars 9-12 belt TAKE ME HIGHER octave up at peak intensity, bars 13-16 melismatic ad-lib resolve. Bright, anthemic, modern club-diva delivery — peak-time energy, NOT bedroom soul. Imagine a vocal stem isolated from a 2000s filtered-house anthem. Loopable.

A cappella pitched-up female HEY stab repeated rhythmically (HEY STABS), 120 BPM, A minor, 16 bars. The ONLY syllable in the entire 16-bar loop is the word HEY — never any other lyrics, never sustained ahhh, never a melody. PURE VOCAL ONLY — absolutely no instruments, no drums, no bass, no piano, no synth, no melody, no beat, no instrumental backing whatsoever. Each HEY is a SHORT pitched-up percussive stab less than 200 ms long, like a producer chopped a soul vocal HEY and pitched it up for a house track. Pattern: HEY on beats 1 and 3 of every bar, sometimes HEY on the and-of-2 for syncopation, identical stab pattern repeats across all 16 bars. NOT a sung hook, NOT a chorus, NOT feel-the-music lyrics — only the single syllable HEY repeating on the rhythm grid. Continuous vocal energy across all 16 bars; no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable.

A cappella ISOLATED sung female bright AAAH vocal pad in modern filtered-house style (AAAH PAD), 120 BPM, A minor, 8 bars. The ONLY syllable in the entire 8-bar loop is AAAH — sustained female AAAH tones building a wide, anthemic Ibiza-style chord pad. NOT dreamy, NOT smoky, NOT lounge — think peak-time terrace anthem AAAH stacks (classic 2000s filtered-house era), bright and forward like sunrise on the dancefloor. STRICTLY VOCAL TRACK ONLY — absolutely no kick drum, no snare, no hi-hat, no bass, no sub-bass, no synth, no piano, no pad, no rhythmic backing of any kind. NOTHING below 100 Hz must be present. Stacked female harmonies (3 voices in 3rds and 5ths) sustain AAAH continuously: bars 1-2 AAAH on root A, bars 3-4 AAAH on third C, bars 5-6 AAAH on fifth E with growing brightness, bars 7-8 AAAH descending back to A. Continuous vocal energy across all 8 bars; no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Imagine an a cappella stem isolated from a French-house anthem. Loopable.

A cappella sung male hip-house chopped vocal stab, 120 BPM, A minor, 8 bars. PURE VOCAL ONLY — absolutely no instruments, no drums, no bass, no piano, no synth, no melody, no beat, no instrumental backing whatsoever. One voice, recorded a cappella in a vocal booth. Sung MELODICALLY (not spoken) with this evolving structure: bars 1-2 sing yeah yeah on offbeats, bars 3-4 sing oh yeah on the downbeat, bars 5-6 sing yeah yeah hey hey rhythmically, bars 7-8 sing oh yeah resolving. Hooky, percussive, classic hip-house chant. Continuous vocal energy across all 8 bars; no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable.

A cappella ISOLATED sung male filtered-house vocal hook repeating FEEL THE MUSIC, 120 BPM, A minor, 16 bars. Modern French-house / Ibiza club male diva delivery — bright, anthemic, four-on-the-floor energy. NOT 70s soul, NOT gospel, NOT smoky lounge — think 2000s filtered-house male vocal samples (classic 2000s filtered-house era), peak-time club energy. STRICTLY VOCAL TRACK ONLY — absolutely no kick drum, no snare, no hi-hat, no bass, no sub-bass, no synth, no piano, no pad, no rhythmic backing of any kind. NOTHING below 100 Hz must be present. The male voice sings continuously every single bar — no silent bars, no break longer than 200 ms. Bars 1-4 belt FEEL THE MUSIC on the A minor root with bright forward attack, bars 5-8 climb YEAH YEAH YEAH ascending the scale anthem-style, bars 9-12 belt FEEL THE MUSIC octave up at peak intensity, bars 13-16 sustained AHHH resolve. Bright, anthemic, modern club-diva delivery — peak-time energy. Imagine a vocal stem isolated from a 2000s filtered-house anthem. Loopable.

A cappella pitched-up female HEY stab repeated rhythmically (PITCHED HEY), 120 BPM, A minor, 16 bars. The ONLY syllable in the entire 16-bar loop is the word HEY — never any other lyrics, never sustained ahhh, never a melody. PURE VOCAL ONLY — absolutely no instruments, no drums, no bass, no piano, no synth, no melody, no beat, no instrumental backing whatsoever. Each HEY is a SHORT pitched-up percussive stab less than 200 ms long, pitched higher than natural register so it sits on top of a beat. Pattern: HEY on every beat (4 stabs per bar), occasionally doubled HEY HEY on the and-of-2 of every 4th bar, identical stab pattern repeats across all 16 bars. NOT a sung hook, NOT love-is-the-music lyrics — only the single syllable HEY repeating on the rhythm grid. Continuous vocal energy across all 16 bars; no fades, no silent bars, no intro, no outro. Loopable.
Single short white-noise snare crescendo one-shot, 1 second. Building snare roll into a final hit. Modern house mix. No bass, no melody, no vocals. Just one drum fill.
Single tom-tom drum fill one-shot, 1.2 seconds. High tom, mid tom, low tom in quick succession. Modern house drumkit. No bass, no melody, no vocals. Just one drum fill.
Single open hi-hat cymbal one-shot with long natural decay tail, 1.5 seconds. Bright modern house mix. No bass, no melody, no vocals. Just one cymbal hit.
Single soft crash cymbal one-shot with natural decay, 1.8 seconds. Modern house mix. No bass, no melody, no vocals. Just one crash hit.
Single clap stack one-shot building into a final clap, 1 second. Big-room house clap. No bass, no melody, no vocals. Just one drum fill.
Single very fast 4-stroke drum fill across kick, snare, toms, and crash, 0.8 seconds. Modern house drumkit. No bass, no melody, no vocals. Just one drum fill.
Single rolling kick fill one-shot, 1.2 seconds. Punchy modern house kick rolling. No melody, no vocals. Just one drum fill.
Single cymbal crash with immediate hand-choke, 0.6 seconds. Very short cymbal tail. Modern house mix. No bass, no melody, no vocals. Just one choked cymbal hit.
White-noise riser building upward, 1.5 seconds, fades into nothing at the end. Classic house transition. No instruments, no music. Just one effect.
Reverse cymbal swell rising into nothing, 1.2 seconds, fades naturally. Classic house riser. No instruments, no music. Just one effect.
Vinyl scratch zigga-zigga, three or four quick scratches in 1 second. Bright, classic house turntablism. No instruments, no music. Just one effect.
Air-horn club blast, 0.8 seconds, fades naturally. Classic house club siren. No instruments, no music. Just one effect.
Filter sweep on white noise, sweeping from closed to open, 0.8 seconds. House transition. No instruments, no music. Just one effect.
Synth zap downward sweep, 1 second, fades naturally. Bright modern house effect. No instruments, no music. Just one effect.
Crowd cheer sample, 1.8 seconds, fades naturally. Festival house ambience. No instruments, no music. Just one effect.
Tape stop pitch-down sliding to silence, 1.5 seconds. Classic house effect. No instruments, no music. Just one effect.
